# `dnsight spf generate`

Print a minimal SPF TXT record.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--include` | text | — | no | Comma-separated include: domains for generated record. |
| `--disposition` | choice | `'-all'` | no | Terminal disposition. |
